hooks.command: TODAY=$(date +%F); [ -f "docs/daily/$TODAY.md" ] || jq -n --arg t "$TODAY" '{systemMessage: "❌ 今日 daily 未写：docs/daily/\($t).md"}'

IDEAS=$(grep -cv '^\s*$\|^#' docs/inbox/ceo-ideas-log.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0); PROPS=$(grep -cv '^\s*$\|^#' docs/inbox/proposals-for-strategist.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$IDEAS" -gt 30 ] || [ "$PROPS" -gt 30 ]; then jq -n --arg i "$IDEAS" --arg p "$PROPS" '{systemMessage: ("📥 inbox 积压：ceo-ideas-log "+$i+" 行 / proposals-for-strategist "+$p+" 行，Assistant 该分诊了")}'; fi
